title: iberis prostii subsp. violletii
intro: Iberis prostii subsp. violletii, also known as Candytuft or Violet Candytuft, is a flowering plant species within the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, offering various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Candytuft can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in traditional herbal medicine.
